_note: Retains only detection_rate_per_scenario (30/30 ripple presence per scenario with Wilson 95% intervals, lower bound 0.72), which the paper cites. Superseded fields from the earlier pipeline (surface-monotonicity rho, pooled bootstrap means, pooled Mann-Whitney) were removed; the paper's rho=-0.13 comes from fig2_sparse_attack_cascade_per_rep.csv and the Induced means 1345/1346/1234 from scenario_decomposition.csv.
